candidate_lesson.lesson_text: Trades that must be RECONSTRUCTED from the fills ledger (no log_forex_decision() call) are structurally blind and should be treated as UNRELIABLE — 6 of 7 such trades lost (WR=14%, avg R=-0.011).
candidate_lesson.mechanism: When the entry path bypasses log_forex_decision(), it means the trade fired outside the vetted signal pipeline — no commitment_score, no VIX gate, no rate_diff_z check, no session filter ran. These are orphaned fills from a code path that skips every one of the Six Tenets' gates, so they entered with zero regime-appropriateness or health verification. The single win (USD_JPY +1.92R) is survivorship noise, not edge.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if decision.why_this_trade.startswith('RECONSTRUCTED') or decision.signal_layers_active == []: flag UNRELIABLE, block auto-execution, require pipeline re-entry with populated commitment_score before sizing.
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Removes the -1.0R tail losses (AUD_NZD, USD_JPY) and the four flat-to-negative USD_CAD scratches; eliminating ungated entries should lift realized WR from 14% toward the gated baseline and cut variance — directly improving Sharpe by reducing uncompensated loss dispersion.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: All 7 closed trades have why_this_trade='RECONSTRUCTED from fills ledger; entry path did not call log_forex_decision()' with empty entry_context, null commitment_score, and empty signal_layers_active. 6L/1W, avg R=-0.011. The USD_CAD cluster (4 trades) all scratched at -0.0R, indicating entries with no thesis that died on spread/noise.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_reasoning: Every entry has signal_layers_active=[], commitment_score=null, rate_differential_zscore=null, and entry_context={} — the reasoning layer is entirely absent, which is itself the failure predictor: 100% of ungated trades either lost or scratched except one noise win.

reflection.system_health_note: System is in a data-integrity crisis, not a strategy crisis — 0 logged trades in 7 days and all closed trades are unlogged reconstructions, so no lesson can be validated until the entry path calls log_forex_decision() and populates decision context.
